Name: FScrollBarStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SScrollBar

Variables.Name: HorizontalBackgroundImage
Variables.Description: Background image to use when the scrollbar is oriented horizontally

Variables.Name: VerticalBackgroundImage
Variables.Description: Background image to use when the scrollbar is oriented vertically

Variables.Name: VerticalTopSlotImage
Variables.Description: The image to use to represent the track above the thumb when the scrollbar is oriented vertically

Variables.Name: HorizontalTopSlotImage
Variables.Description: The image to use to represent the track above the thumb when the scrollbar is oriented horizontally

Variables.Name: VerticalBottomSlotImage
Variables.Description: The image to use to represent the track below the thumb when the scrollbar is oriented vertically

Variables.Name: HorizontalBottomSlotImage
Variables.Description: The image to use to represent the track below the thumb when the scrollbar is oriented horizontally

Variables.Name: NormalThumbImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the scrollbar thumb is in its normal state

Variables.Name: HoveredThumbImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the scrollbar thumb is in its hovered state

Variables.Name: DraggedThumbImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the scrollbar thumb is in its dragged state
